'''Morrina Reugus''' worked at [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] as a senior [[Traffic controller/Legends|traffic controller]].

==Biography==
After her parents were accused of [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] weapons and executed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], she went to live with relatives on Brentaal. She started working in the spaceport and worked her way up to the position of senior starport traffic controller. Morrina joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and developed an informal code system using specific phrases to identify ships friendly to the Alliance. Using her position of a starport traffic controller, and working with [[Sarchen Snyle/Legends|Sarchen Snyle]], another Rebel sympathizer, she would ensured that ships bound for Alliance bases were not searched.

==Personality and traits==
Reugus was dedicated to her job, and would help other controllers in their duties. She kept her uniform tidy and wore her long brown hair in a bun when on-duty.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{1stm}}
